title: Hiring Category Manager at Mothercare India

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Mothercare India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Mothercare India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Category Manager to strengthen our Tiruchirappalli-based team.

About Mothercare India:
Mothercare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mothercare India!
